summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Jelly Bells rhythm game. All core functionality working correctly including homepage navigation, Free Play mode with bell interactions and notation display, Rhythm Game with difficulty selection and gameplay, Simon Says with pattern recognition, and character displays.

minor_issues.issue: Occasional network request failure for bell images (D 2.png)
minor_issues.impact: Minor - assets exist and load correctly on retry

passed_tests: Homepage loads with JMA logo and game title
All 3 game mode cards present and clickable
Free Play mode bell interactions work with audio feedback
Notation display updates correctly showing played notes
Rhythm Game menu shows Easy/Medium/Hard difficulties
Rhythm Game START button works and launches gameplay
Simon Says menu shows instructions and START button
Simon Says gameplay works with pattern display and player interaction
Home button navigation works from all pages
Characters (Finn Danger, Charlie the Polliwog) appear on appropriate pages
Bell clicking produces visual feedback and notation updates
Game state transitions work correctly between modes
